objective: Build a fundamental and valuation research layer with explicit PIT data confidence and repair gaps.
forbidden: Do not use current snapshots as historical backtest features.
Do not hide missing PIT data.
acceptance_criteria: Current snapshot confidence is capped and historical_backtest_allowed is false.
Latest composite rows are not direct historical backtest features.
Market valuation components expose valuation_history_backtest_allowed only when historical PE/PB history exists.
Macro snapshot uses available_date and passes macro_pit_check.csv.
Partial PE/PB history is recorded in the gap register.
failure_conditions: Missing data gaps when PIT history is absent.
Current snapshot is allowed into historical backtests.
Latest research rows are treated as historical backtest features.
